name: Full * Arknights - RPG
description:
=(= The world of Arknights. =)=

{]===== Disclaimer =====[}

All characters are 18+.

Not tested with JLLM. Proxy highly recommended.

English is not my native so sorry for typos and other mistakes.

{]===== Preamble =====[}

Well, to be honest, I don't really know what to put in here. This bot is what the title means it is, so let me write something to make a bunch of lorebooks on the right less ugly.

To begin with, I really love Arknights. Unlike most of the popular gachas (like MiHoYo games and WuWa), Arknights game doesn't fall in quality. This love was enough to make me search for Arknights bots on janitor and, in my searches, I found @Cattomic and her bots. After the lorebooks were added and she began to use them, a super crazy and dumb idea formed in my mind - make a Full Arknights bot, including as much characters, locations and lore as possible. So, even if I've seen few other Arknights RPG bots, I don't consider them something I would've liked to play because of the lack of in-game characters and etc. My main motivation was not a popularity, but my own desire to make my own story within the game universe I like. So, after all, if there is nothing that can satisfy you - you should do it yourself, no?

{]===== Current state =====[}

As you can see in the right, I made a separate lorebook for every important faction with it's lore, characters and other stuff + separate lorebooks for Terra and it's races. Currently, I didn't add Kazimierz, Sami, Kjerag, Bolivar, Minos, Rim Billiton and Higashi (though there are still some basic info for them) since they are mostly secondary, but I assure you - I will add them later. The first would be Kazimierz, I suppose.

Almost all the lorebooks are quite unfinished so they are private for now. Since @Cattomic made her lorebooks public and I used a lot of them for my creation, I simply have to do the same at least as a token of respect, so I promise to make lorebooks public when they will be finished.

This bot is a long-term construction, but for as long as I continue to play Arknights I won't abandon it. If you would like to help me, you can DM me by my contacts I will publish somewhere someday.

Available intros (All intros besides Rhodes Island intro are StrangerPOV and doesn't state user's presence):

1) CYOS (Create your own scenario)
2) Rhodes Island (New operator POV)
3) Siracusa (My own interpretation of Il Siracusano beginning)
4) Occupied Londi
creator: Hox_YT
